name: Number Kingdom
description: Master the fundamentals — addition, multiplication, decimals, fractions, and the building blocks of all mathematics.

name: Arithmetic Kingdom
description: Apply numbers to the real world — percentages, ratios, profit and loss, finance, and measurement.
unlockRequirements: Complete the Number Kingdom Boss to unlock

name: Geometry Kingdom
description: A realm of shapes, angles, and the hidden symmetry of space.
unlockRequirements: Complete the Arithmetic Kingdom Boss to unlock

name: Algebra Kingdom
description: Where letters hold secrets — equations, inequalities, surds, and polynomials.
unlockRequirements: Complete the Geometry Kingdom Boss to unlock

name: Advanced Mathematics
description: Matrices, vectors, logarithms, sequences, and complex numbers await the bold.
unlockRequirements: Complete the Algebra Kingdom Boss to unlock

name: Coordinate & Calculus
description: Lines, curves, limits, derivatives, and integrals — mathematics in motion.
unlockRequirements: Complete the Advanced Mathematics Boss to unlock

name: Data & Logic
description: Statistics, sets, logic, and language — the final frontier of mathematical reasoning.
unlockRequirements: Complete the Coordinate & Calculus Boss to unlock
